# debugtools

> Free, open-source, privacy-focused browser tools for developers. debugtools helps debug APIs, format data, decode tokens, compare code, inspect bundles, and document releases.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://debugtools.org/): Project overview and featured tools.
- [All tools](https://debugtools.org/tools/all/): Complete tool registry.
- [Developer answers](https://debugtools.org/answers/): Concise answer pages for common debugging workflows.
- [CLI roadmap](https://debugtools.org/cli/): Command-line plans and scope.
- [Roadmap](https://debugtools.org/roadmap/): Shipped work, active foundation work, and future modules.
- [Releases](https://debugtools.org/releases/): Release notes and changelog context.
- [FAQ](https://debugtools.org/faq/): Product, privacy, contribution, licensing, and usage answers.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/jasimvkarim/mydebugtools): Source code, issues, license, and contribution workflow.

## Shipped Tools

- [API Tester](https://debugtools.org/tools/api/): REST client with collections, auth, environments, imports, and response inspection.
- [JSON Formatter](https://debugtools.org/tools/json/): Format, validate, repair, and inspect JSON payloads.
- [JWT Decoder](https://debugtools.org/tools/jwt/): Decode JWT headers and payload claims locally in the browser.
- [HTTP Status Codes](https://debugtools.org/tools/http-status/): Reference HTTP status codes and response meanings.
- [Code Diff](https://debugtools.org/tools/code-diff/): Compare snippets during code review and debugging.
- [Base64 Encoder and Decoder](https://debugtools.org/tools/base64/): Encode and decode Base64 strings and files.
- [Regex Tester](https://debugtools.org/tools/regex/): Test regular expressions with live matches.
- [Color Picker](https://debugtools.org/tools/color/): Pick, convert, and inspect color values.
- [CSS Tools](https://debugtools.org/tools/css/): Minify, beautify, and validate CSS.
- [HTML Tools](https://debugtools.org/tools/html/): Format, preview, and inspect HTML.
- [Markdown Preview](https://debugtools.org/tools/markdown/): Write and preview Markdown content.
- [Icon Finder](https://debugtools.org/tools/icons/): Search icon libraries for UI assets.
- [Crash Beautifier](https://debugtools.org/tools/crash-beautifier/): Clean up and inspect stack traces.
- [Build Diff](https://debugtools.org/tools/build-diff/): Compare build outputs and artifact changes.
- [Bundle Analyzer](https://debugtools.org/tools/bundle-analyzer/): Inspect bundle size and composition.
- [Database Query](https://debugtools.org/tools/database/): Run SQLite queries in a focused workspace.
- [Startup Profiling](https://debugtools.org/tools/startup-profiling/): Visualize React Native startup timelines.
- [Hash Generator](https://debugtools.org/tools/hash/): Generate SHA hashes locally in the browser.
- [UUID Generator](https://debugtools.org/tools/uuid/): Generate UUID v4 values in bulk for fixtures and local development.
- [URL Encoder and Decoder](https://debugtools.org/tools/url/): Encode, decode, and inspect URLs and query strings.
- [Timestamp Converter](https://debugtools.org/tools/timestamp/): Convert Unix timestamps, ISO strings, UTC, and local date-time values.

## Answer Pages

- [Best free JSON formatter](https://debugtools.org/answers/best-free-json-formatter/)
- [How to decode a JWT safely](https://debugtools.org/answers/how-to-decode-jwt-safely/)
- [Base64 encode vs decode](https://debugtools.org/answers/base64-encode-vs-decode/)
- [Test an API request online](https://debugtools.org/answers/test-api-request-online/)
- [Compare two code snippets](https://debugtools.org/answers/compare-two-code-snippets/)
